title: Astronaut Cat Style Reference
sourceTitle: Grok 1 Midjourney Prompt Astronaut Cat Sref

imagePrompts.prompt:
Grok

1. Midjourney Prompt
Astronaut Cat --sref 1236693939
--ar 1:1 --sw 100 --stylize 300 --v 8.1

2. Nano Banana 2 Prompt
Preserve as much of my image as
possible and make it photorealistic
